title: 8 Generating Reports in Cash Services
body_text:
8	Generating Reports in Cash Services
8.1	Overview of Generating Reports in Cash Services
Admin Users can generate reports in Cash Services for the locations they have access to. There are two reports available:
Order History Report
â Generates a list of previous orders based on parameters entered.
User Audit Report
â Provides a list of users based on parameters entered.
8.2	Order History Report
To generate an Order History report:
Note:	Only Admin Users can generate reports in Cash Services.
Log in to the application as described in Section 5.2, Accessing Cash Services via the Client Centre.
Select
ePortal Reports
, then select
Order History Report
. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Selecting Order History Report
Select report parameters to indicate the information you want to generate. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Selecting Parameters for Order History Report
Select the locations you want to include in the report (you must have access to the locations you select). See Figure 3.
Figure 3: Selecting Locations for Order History Report
Select the provinces, as applicable, then select
Display Report
. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Selecting Provinces and Generating the Report
By default, the Order History report is displayed with the parameters hidden. To display the parameters you chose, select
Show Parameters
. You can print or save the report, or you can export the results to PDF, XML, and XLS. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Order History Report with Parameters Hidden
If parameters are displayed on the report (as described above), you can choose different options, then select
Display Report
to generate another output. See Figure 6.
Figure 6: Order History Report with Parameters Showing
8.3	User Audit Report
To generate a User Audit report:
Note:	Only Admin Users can generate reports in Cash Services.
Log in to the application as described in Section 5.2, Accessing Cash Services via the Client Centre.
Select
ePortal Reports
, then select
User Audit Report
. See Figure 7.
Figure 7: Selecting User Audit Report
Select report parameters to indicate the information you want to generate, then select
Display Report
. See Figure 8.
Figure 8: Selecting Parameters for the User Audit Report
By default, the User Audit report is displayed with the parameters hidden. To display the parameters you chose, select
Show Parameters
. You can print or save the report, or you can export the results to PDF, XML, and XLS. See Figure 9.
Figure 9: User Audit Report with Parameters Hidden
If parameters are displayed on the report (as described above), you can choose a different option, then select
Display Report
to generate another output. See Figure 10.
Figure 10: User Audit Report with Parameters Showing
END
